programme.title: Codebreaker
programme.desc: The first of a two-part docu-drama uncovering the secret of how a 24-year-old maths student and a GPO engineer hacked into Hitler's personal code machine - not the Enigma coding system, but something even more intimidating known as his 'secret writer'. Despite his achievements, codebreaker Alan Turing's life was dogged by tragedy

programme.title: We Dive at Dawn (1943)
programme.desc: A British submarine crew is unexpectedly ordered to carry out a top-secret mission to sink the German fleet's latest battleship in the Baltic Sea. But it is not long before disaster strikes and the vessel becomes stranded in the middle of the ocean with no fuel or food. Second World War adventure, starring John Mills, Eric Portman, Reginald Purdell and Niall MacGinnis

programme.title: Angels One Five (1953)
programme.desc: A new recruit joins a squadron of British fighter pilots in the summer of 1940, as they prepare to face a confrontation with the overwhelming forces of the Luftwaffe over the English Channel, while the ground crew at their base anxiously awaits reports from the conflict. Second World War adventure, starring Jack Hawkins and John Gregson

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A London couple with a budget of £85,000 view six houses on the Costa del Azahar, hoping to buy a second home. Properties include a converted village school, an apartment in a golfing complex and a townhouse within medieval city walls. Alternatively, they may opt for one of two roof terraces or a home built into rock that boasts stunning scenery

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Secret Army
programme.desc: Peter Williams tells the story of the resistance movement set up around the coast by Winston Churchill to harass Nazi invaders should the Germans reach British soil

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home

programme.title: The Jericho Jailbreak
programme.desc: On the 19th February 1944, RAF Mosquito bombers attacked Amiens Jail to free French resistance fighters awaiting execution by the Nazis. We look at who ordered this and why

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The history of suggestive songs and their vaudeville and music hall beginnings, with artists featured including Judy Garland, Liberace, Mae West, Edith Piaf and Marlene Dietrich

programme.title: The Flowers of War (2011)
programme.desc: An American drifter arrives in Nanjing in 1937, just as Japanese forces invade. Hiding out in a Western-run church, he poses as a priest, but ends up adopting his role and providing shelter for orphans and courtesans as carnage unfolds in the city. Drama, starring Christian Bale and Ni Ni. In Nanjing dialect, English, Japanese, Mandarin and Shanghainese

programme.title: Centrespread (1981)
programme.desc: A photographer in a dystopian future searches for a nude model he can turn into a star, a quest that leads him to question the society he has become a part of. Sci-fi drama, starring Kylie Foster and Paul Trahair

programme.title: Blood Feud (2016)
programme.desc: An ex-convict is released from 10 years in prison for killing a gangster's son - unaware that his best friend has been hired by his victim's father to murder him. When the truth emerges, the two old partners in crime decide to work together to make amends for their past misdeeds - even if it means crossing the vengeful crime boss. Crime drama, starring Paul King and Micky Curate

programme.title: The Repo Man
programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: Sarah Beeny meets a Tonbridge family who have resigned themselves to life on a building site as they attempt to modernise and extend their three-bedroom bungalow in the hope of moving up the property ladder

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: McMeer's home is flooded, so Zigby sets out to build a new one for him

programme.title: Zigby
programme.desc: The lively zebra loses his pineapples and suspects they have been stolen by pirates

programme.title: Zoo Babies
programme.desc: A heart warming and inspiring series that welcomes the arrival of new members of the animal kingdom in Zoo's around the world, as well as showcasing endangered species being born in captivity

programme.title: Underwater World for Kids
programme.desc: An underwater adventure that takes in the many natural wonders and magical sea creatures above and below our oceans

programme.title: Skippy The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: The adventures of a young boy and his pet kangaroo

programme.title: Heidi
programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life

programme.title: All You Need Is Love
programme.desc: The history of suggestive songs and their vaudeville and music hall beginnings, with artists featured including Judy Garland, Liberace, Mae West, Edith Piaf and Marlene Dietrich

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home

programme.title: Piccadilly Incident (1946)
programme.desc: A Wren is pronounced missing in action, but returns three years later to find her husband has remarried. Melodrama, starring Anna Neagle and Michael Wilding

programme.title: Forty Thousand Horsemen (1941)
programme.desc: Three Australian volunteers take part in the last cavalry charge in modern warfare while serving in Palestine. First World War drama, starring Grant Taylor and Betty Bryant

programme.title: The Big Blockade (1942)
programme.desc: Second World War mock-documentary, featuring a series of scenes about the importance of Britain's economic blockade on Germany, demonstrating the international repercussions of the action and the responses of the British public. Starring Leslie Banks, Michael Redgrave, John Mills, Will Hay and Robert Morley

programme.title: Mantovani TV Specials
programme.desc: Mantovani's 1950s TV series featuring special guests and hits of the time played by Mantovani and his Orchestra

programme.title: Spitfire Women
programme.desc: The story of the 168 female pilots who served in Britain's Air Transport Auxiliary - an organisation responsible for delivering aircraft to the RAF on the front lines of battle during the Second World War. Despite having no radio or navigation equipment, ATA pilots were expected to fly any kind of aircraft to the destinations where they were most needed, often risking their lives in the process. The film also features interviews with the last surviving female veterans, who speak about the dangers they encountered in the skies and the discrimination they faced back home

programme.title: Death or Freedom: The Jericho Jailbreak
programme.desc: The story of Operation Jericho, a 1944 mission that saw a squadron of RAF Mosquito bombers try to free French Resistance fighters from a prison in Amiens

programme.title: Dam Busters
programme.desc: The stories behind one of the most daring raids of the Second World War, in which a squadron of Lancaster bombers destroyed two dams in the heart of industrial Germany

programme.title: The Last Day of WW1
programme.desc: An account of how soldiers continued to be killed in battle hours after the armistice between the Allies and Germany had been signed in 1918. Presented by Michael Palin

programme.title: Churchill's Traitors
programme.desc: An in-depth look at those who betrayed Winston Churchill during the Second World War, and the events that led to the attack on Pearl Harbour in December 1941

programme.title: The Loft (2014)
programme.desc: Five successful married men rent an apartment where they can carry out their extra-marital affairs in secret. The arrangement works well until they find the corpse of a beautiful woman handcuffed to a bed - but which of them is the killer, and how will the grisly discovery affect their friendship? Thriller, with Karl Urban, James Marsden and Wentworth Miller

programme.title: The Escort (2015)
programme.desc: A sex-obsessed journalist whose career is falling apart has a chance encounter in a bar with a high-class prostitute. Seeing a chance to write the story that will make him a success, he persuades her to let him document her life, and a strange connection develops between the two lonely outsiders. Comedy drama, starring Michael Doneger, Lyndsy Fonseca and Bruce Campbell

programme.title: Cruel Passion (1977)
programme.desc: Two sisters are expelled from a nunnery and are plunged into a life of debauchery. While one embraces her new lifestyle, the other is desperate to cling to her old morality and sees a hope of salvation in a mysterious aristocrat who harbours a hidden dark side. Historical drama based on the novel Justine by the Marquis de Sade, starring Koo Stark and Martin Potter

programme.desc: In recession-hit Britain, many people have turned to finance companies to purchase items over a fixed period of time. This documentary follows the life and work of bailiff Sean James as he confronts debtors across the nation who fail to keep up their repayments

programme.title: Property Ladder
programme.desc: An actor pours his savings into revamping his two-bedroomed home in Plaistow, east London, in the hope of making a killing on the property market

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner

programme.title: Pointless Celebrities
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman challenge four teams of stars from the world of music to take part in the unorthodox general knowledge quiz. Former Marillion lead singer Fish teams up with Scottish folk star Barbara Dickson, while Haircut 100's Nick Heyward joins forces with pop rocker Toyah Willcox. Heather Small, formerly the lead singer of M People, joins the Neasden Queen of Soul Mari Wilson, and Liberty X's Jessica Taylor partners her former bandmate Kelli Young. As ever, the contestants strive to correctly guess the least likely correct answers to a series of questions posed to members of the public

programme.title: NFL: America's Game
programme.desc: Revisiting Dallas Cowboys' 1995 Super Bowl victory over Pittsburgh Steelers at the Sun Devil Stadium in Tempe, Arizona. Dallas tied the record set by the San Francisco 49ers in the previous year by claiming their fifth Vince Lombardi trophy with a 27-17 victory. They also became the first team to win the showpiece match three times in four years
